title: genrc
description: Configuration file for gen, a CLI tool that generates shell commands using LLMs.

model.description: The model identifier to use with the provider.

api_key.description: API key for the provider. Not required for ollama. Can also be set via the GEN_API_KEY environment variable.

apiKeyHelper.description: A shell command that outputs the API key to stdout. Used as a fallback when api_key is not set. Useful for secret managers like 1Password CLI.

api_url.description: Custom base URL for the provider API. Defaults to the provider's standard URL. For ollama, defaults to http://localhost:11434/v1.
